notes: South African national standards body. Publishes SANS (South African National Standards) including local adoptions of ISO/IEC and SABS-original standards. Paywalled at store.sabs.co.za.

data.official_name: SANS - South African National Standards (ISO/IEC adoptions)
data.notes: Paywalled. SANS-prefixed numbers are South African editions; technical content tracks the ISO master.
